assertions.assertion: Program.cs includes MigrationsAssembly set to the current project assembly in both store configurations
assertions.rationale: Both stores use sql.MigrationsAssembly(migrationsAssembly) where migrationsAssembly = typeof(Program).Assembly.GetName().Name.

assertions.assertion: The response includes a dotnet ef migrations add command with -c ConfigurationDbContext
assertions.rationale: dotnet ef migrations add InitialConfigurationDb -c ConfigurationDbContext is provided.

assertions.assertion: The response includes a dotnet ef migrations add command with -c PersistedGrantDbContext
assertions.rationale: dotnet ef migrations add InitialPersistedGrantDb -c PersistedGrantDbContext is provided.

assertions.assertion: The response includes dotnet ef database update commands for both contexts
assertions.rationale: dotnet ef database update -c ConfigurationDbContext and -c PersistedGrantDbContext are both provided.
